identity.philosophy: Soft Minimalism with Organic Warmth. Anti-generic SaaS.
principles: Fusion: SaaS precision meets botanical warmth.
Content: Data is beautiful, but whitespace is king.
Contrast: Dark charcoal sidebar vs. warm beige content.

typography.instructions: Import Manrope from Google Fonts. Use Manrope for all Headings (h1-h3). Use Inter for body text and data tables.

layout.structure: Sidebar Layout (Fixed Left) + Scrollable Main Content

buttons.primary: bg-gold hover:bg-gold-hover text-white font-medium px-6 py-2.5 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-900

cards.base: bg-white border border-gray-100/50 shadow-card hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: bg-white border-gray-200 focus:border-gold focus:ring-gold/20 transition-all duration-200

components.status_badge: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wide

visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Use solid colors and subtle shadows.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the sidebar (optional) to add depth.

login_sidebar.description: Modern minimalist bench against brick wall - use for Login Page side panel

dashboard_banner.description: Modern university walkway - use for Student Dashboard Welcome Banner

empty_state.description: Minimalist building with scooter - use for 'No Complaints' empty state

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add Manrope to index.html or import in CSS.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'colors' extension provided above.
3. CSS VARIABLES: Update index.css :root variables to match the 'warm-bg' (#F9F9F7) and 'sidebar' (#0F1115) theme.
4. SIDEBAR: Create a Sidebar component that is fixed width (e.g., w-64) on desktop, hidden on mobile (hamburger menu). Use the Dark Charcoal theme.
5. DASHBOARD LAYOUT: The main content area must use the Warm Beige background (#F9F9F7).
6. CARDS: All dashboard widgets (stats, charts, tables) must be white cards with rounded-xl and soft shadow.
7. CHARTS: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Customize colors to be soft pastels (Blue, Green, Yellow, Red) to match the 'Soft Minimalism' vibe. NO NEON.
8. FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components but style them with the 'inputs.base' styles defined above.
9. LOGIN PAGE: Split screen. Left side: Login Form (Warm Beige). Right side: Image (login_sidebar URL) with a dark overlay.
10. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. No default blue buttons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. Whitespace = Luxury.
Micro-interactions: Add hover states to everything clickable.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Do not center align the app container.
